description: Stable local identifier for an external product repository; must not rely on basename alone.
Default workflow menu that created or owns the repository registration.
Workflow contexts that may select this repository.
User-confirmed product display name shown by Dashboard and CLI.
Local absolute path of an independent product repository stored in learning state and never shown directly in normal Dashboard UI; parent management does not merge Git history or source ownership.
Whether the registered path exists as a readable directory.
Whether the registered path has Git metadata when the selected mode needs Git.
Product-local operation mode observed from the registered repository.
Git/CI usage mode applied to this repository and context.
Product type used by scaffold and evidence requirements.
Relative profile source used to verify display identity.
Relative operation-mode source used to verify parent management.
Relative product-local agent rulebook path.
Registry readiness for dashboard selection and workflow gates.
Last parent-side verification time for the registration.
How the row entered the registry.
Workflow menu whose active repository is selected by this row.
Selected repository identifier for the menu and the only product target eligible for instruction resolution; selection does not grant parent ownership of child source or history.
Time the active repository selection was changed.
Surface that selected the repository.
Selection validity after comparing registry, path, and operation-mode data.
